title: Section 50
content: 50. Rectification of Register by 1[High Court].--The 1[Hight Court], on application of the Registrar of Copyrights or of any person aggrieved, shall order the rectification of the Register of Copyrights by-- (a) the making of any entry wrongly omitted to be made in the register, or (b) the expunging of any entry wrongly made in, or remaining on, the register, or (c) the correction of any error or defect in the register.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 33 of 2021, s.10, for “Appellate Board” (w.e.f. 4-4-2021).
